nasb.text: Therefore when Jesus had received the sour wine, He said, “It is finished!” And He bowed His head and gave up His spirit.

esv.text: When Jesus had received the sour wine, he said, “It is finished,” and he bowed his head and gave up his spirit.

cnv.text: 耶穌嘗了那酸酒，說：“成了！”就低下頭，斷了氣。

ccb.text: 耶稣尝了那醋酒，然后说：“成了！”就垂下头来，将灵魂交给了上帝。

csbs.text: 耶稣尝了酸酒后，就说：“成了！”然后垂下头，交出了灵魂。
